message:
licensing: adopt MIT + OpenAI/Anthropic rider and align workspace metadata

Scope:
- Add new root LICENSE using the full rider text (MIT with OpenAI/Anthropic restriction)
- Replace workspace package metadata from license = "MIT" to license-file = "LICENSE"
- Add explicit README license section to avoid ambiguity between manifest metadata and public docs

Why:
- Align this repository with the same rider-based licensing policy used in the reference workflow
- Ensure crates.io/cargo metadata points at canonical license text rather than advertising plain MIT
- Keep external documentation and machine-readable metadata consistent

Validation:
- Searched manifests/docs for contradictory plain-MIT references after edit
- Ran UBS over changed files (Cargo.toml, README.md, LICENSE) with no critical/warning findings

Traceability:
- Bead: bd-c8li
- Mail thread: br-c8li
